strengths: Three objects are clearly identified with specific, real-world contexts, grounding the exhibition in lived experience.
Commentary consistently links each object to the implied IA prompt through distinct motivations for knowledge-seeking (cultural identity, academic prestige, sustainability).
Use of quantitative data and external citations (e.g., QS rankings, emissions statistics) demonstrates effort at evidence-based justification beyond mere description.
weaknesses: The chosen IA prompt is never explicitly named, weakening precision in the link between objects and TOK focus.
Explanations occasionally rely on broad or generic assertions rather than tightly analytic connections to TOK concepts (ways of knowing, knowledge questions).
Citation formatting is inconsistent and some URLs/references are incomplete or uncited in the text, detracting from professionalism and traceability.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Although assessed by the examiner at band 5-6 (6/10), the holistic quality of this workâthree well-contextualized objects, coherent justifications tied to motivations for seeking knowledge, and the use of quantitative supportâwarrants a very high mark when calibrated against the rubric. Small precision issues (implicit prompt, occasional generic language, citation inconsistencies) prevent a perfect 10. A score of 9/10 fairly reflects the strong overall execution with minor weaknesses.

annotations.comment: The Craftory entry is missing publication details and URL should be complete. Verify citation elements for accuracy.
The student uses a concrete, personal object with clear cultural context, effectively grounding the exhibition in a real-world scenario.
The commentary implies the IA prompt but never names it explicitly. The student should clearly state the chosen prompt to improve precision in linking objects to TOK.
The use of Funelas (2024) to trace linguistic evolution is effective evidence of depth beyond description, showcasing a strong attempt at justification.
The explanation remains largely descriptive. To deepen the analysis, incorporate explicit TOK concepts such as ways of knowing and areas of knowledge.
How does the image of the translator book enhance the TOK argument rather than simply illustrate the object? Consider linking the visual to the knowledge question.
Object 2 is clearly identified with a specific artifact and origin, strengthening its real-world context.
The discussion of QS rankings is descriptive but drifts from analysing the pursuit of knowledge. Tighten this section to focus on epistemic motivations rather than prestige statistics.
Consider discussing how shared and personal knowledge intersect in this context to add TOK depth to your explanation of social expectations.
The narrative here repeats generic ambition language without linking to specific knowledge processes. Focus on how knowledge itself is sought and evaluated.
The magnet image is prominent, but its symbolic role in knowledge pursuit could be made explicit. How does this visual choice support your argument?
Which knowledge question underpins the Harvard magnetâs inclusion? Articulate it to frame your analysis more explicitly.
Object 3 is well-specified with a current commercial product, reinforcing the connection to modern knowledge practices.
Focus this section on the epistemic drive behind research in food science rather than only on practical benefits.
The student effectively uses quantitative evidence (water savings, emissions) to justify the objectâs relevance to knowledge impact.
Claiming that 22% of the population is vegetarian is interesting, but lacks critical reflection on how this shapes knowledge production or reception.
Introduce a knowledge question here, such as one about the ethics of knowledge application in food science, to sharpen the TOK focus.
How does the Impossible Burger image advance your exploration of knowledge sustainability? Connect visual and conceptual elements.
The word count line is part of the main text. Word counts should be in submission metadata, not integrated into analysis.
Reference formatting is inconsistent. Adopt a single citation style (e.g., APA or MLA) to improve professionalism.
The Scientific American reference lacks in-text attribution. Ensure every source listed is cited within the commentary.
Ensure that every listed URL corresponds to an in-text citation; this maintains traceability between commentary and references.
The stray text fragment "of turning vegetarian." appears disconnected. Remove or integrate it meaningfully into a full reference.
The Hindustan Times URL is broken across lines. Consolidate long URLs or use DOI/shortened format for clarity.

strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
